<!--
Thanks for the PR! Please fill in the summary + checklist below. For
anything more than a trivial change, linking a related issue helps
reviewers understand the context.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? A sentence or two is plenty. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Changeset added for user-facing changes (`pnpm changeset`) — skip for docs-only / internal refactors
- [ ] Docs updated if a public API changed (root README, package README, or CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] Linked to a related issue (if applicable)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Screenshots welcome for UI changes. -->
